tool_args.label: Capital Program Committee Meeting June 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Capital Program Committee Meeting - June 2022 - Metropolitan Transportation Authority

payload.title: Capital Program Committee Meeting
payload.description: MTA Capital Program Committee meeting book for June 27, 2022 covering rolling stock updates (LIRR M-9, NYCT R211, MNR Dual Mode), bus program, safety report, capital program status, quarterly traffic light report, and procurements.

tool_args.label: LIRR M-9 Railcar Project
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR M-9 Railcar Project - Contract was awarded to Kawasaki Rail in September 2013 for 92 Base Order cars

payload.status: In Progress - Conditional Acceptance forecast September 2023
payload.description: Contract for 202 M-9 EMU railcars (92 base + 110 option) for LIRR, awarded to Kawasaki Rail in September 2013. Replacing M-3 cars and providing service to Grand Central Madison.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Contract was awarded to Kawasaki Rail in September 2013 for 92 Base Order cars
Budget Base order 92 cars Option 110 cars Total 202 cars Project Budget $406.4 M $327.2 M $733.6 M
Conditional Acceptance (CA) is now forecast by the project team as September 2023

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: NYCT R211 Subway Car Program
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT Subway Car Program R211 Project Overview - Awarded to Kawasaki in February 2018 - Up to 1,612 cars for NYCT and SIR

payload.description: R211 subway car program with up to 1,612 cars for NYCT and SIR. Base order of 535 cars: 440 R211A, 75 R211S, 20 R211T open gangway test cars. Base order budget $1.75B. Awarded to Kawasaki in February 2018.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Awarded to Kawasaki in February 2018 - Up to 1,612 cars for NYCT and SIR - Base order (535 cars): Base order budget $1.75 B - 440 standard 'R211A' cars - 75 SIR 'R211S' cars - 20 open gangway test 'R211T' cars
The R211 project 535-car base order was awarded to Kawasaki in February 2018 for $1.75B

tool_args.label: SC42 Dual Mode Locomotive Project
tool_args.raw_text: SC42-Dual Mode Locomotive Project Description - The dual mode locomotive contract is intended to replace GE P32AC-DM locomotives

payload.description: Contract for SC42 dual mode locomotives to replace GE P32AC-DM locomotives. Awarded to Siemens in March 2021. Base order of 19 locomotives with options for up to 8 more. Built in Sacramento, CA.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The dual mode locomotive contract is intended to replace GE P32AC-DM locomotives nearing or exceeding their projected 25-year lifespan
Notice of Award – March 2021 to SIEMENS and built in Sacramento, CA
Recently completed second design review (65% of the design completed)

tool_args.label: LIRR M-9 MDBF exceeds contract by ~65%
tool_args.raw_text: the Mean Distance Between Failure (MDBF) for M-9 cars accepted to date exceeds the contract requirement by approximately 65% (250,000 miles vs. 150,000)

tool_args.label: IEC forecasts LIRR M-9 EAC could exceed budget by $9.6M
tool_args.raw_text: the IEC has reviewed the project expenditures to date, including unallocated contingency, outstanding change orders, delay costs and risk on remaining work and forecasts that the Estimate at Completion could exceed the budget by up to $9.6M
